DISCOVERY 302, NO APPEARANCES. RULING: THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PLAINTIFF AMALIA VALDEZ' APPLICATION FOR WRIT OF ATTACHMENT WILL BE HEARD AT 9:30 AM ON THE LAW AND MOTION CALENDAR. JUDGE PRO TEM NILS ROSENQUEST, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, NOT REPORTED.

LAW AND MOTION 302, AMALIA VALDEZ'S APPLICATION AND HEARING FOR WRIT OF ATTACHMENT (ERNESTO AGUIRRE) IS DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE TO REFILING. PLAINTIFF FAILED TO COMPLY WITH THE MANDATORY NOTICE REQUIREMENTS NECESSARY FOR THE ISSUANCE OF A RIGHT TO ATTACH ORDER AND WRIT OF ATTACHMENT. THE MANDATORY JUDICIAL COUNCIL FORM IS NOT ADEQUATELY COMPLETED TO PROVIDE NOTICE OF AN APPLICATION FOR RIGHT TO ATTACH ORDER, WHICH IS REQUIRED FOR ISSUANCE OF A WRIT OF ATTACHMENT. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY C. VAUGHN, CSR # 6185 = (302/MJM)

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT ERNESTO AGUIRRE'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO JANUARY 4, 2013 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 302 TO GIVE MS. VALDEZ THE OPPORTUNITY TO COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6B AND TO GIVE MR. AGUIRRE THE OPPORTUNITY TO FILE AND SERVE A REPLY PER CCP 1005(B). MS. VALDEZ MUST DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF HER OPPOSITION TO DEPARTMENT 302 AND MR. AGUIRRE WITH A COVER LETTER STATING THE NEW HEARING DATE NO LATER THAN DECEMBER 11, 2012 AT 4 PM, OR THE DEMURRER WILL BE SUSTAINED. THE COURT HAS COURTESY COPIES OF THE DEMURRER AND OBJECTION TO OPPOSITION. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, NOT REPORTED.

LAW AND MOTION, 302, RULING - A R G U E D; THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PLAINTIFF AMALIA VALDEZ'S APPLICATION FOR RIGHT TO ATTACH ORDER AND ORDER FOR ISSUANCE OF WRIT OF ATTACHMENT IS DENIED. MS. VALDEZ HAS NOT SHOWN THE PROBABLE VALIDITY OF THE CLAIMS UPON WHICH THE ATTACHMENT IS BASED. THE EVIDENCE SUBMITTED IN OPPOSITION TO THE APPLICATION FOR ATTACHMENT REFUTES THE MOVING PAPERS, AND ATTACHMENT IS NOT AN APPROPRIATE REMEDY. SEE CIVIL PROCEDURE CODE SECTION 484.090(A)(2). ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY VAUGHN, CSR # 6185

Ntc Of Application And Hearing For Right To Attach Order; Order For Issuance Of Writ Of Attachment
Off Calendar Jun-19-2013 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. RONNIE R. GIPSON JR OF HIGA & GIPSON LLP, TEL. NO. 692-6520 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. DAVID HERMELIN OF THE HERMELIN LAW FIRM, TEL. NO. (925) 228-6500 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT.

RULING - A R G U E D; The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF AMALIA VALDEZ's Application For Right To Attach Order and Order For Issuance Of Writ Of Attachment is Denied. Ms. Valdez has not shown the probable validity of the claims upon which the attachment is based. The evidence submitted in opposition to the application for attachment refutes the moving papers, and attachment is not an appropriate remedy. See Civil Procedure Code section 484.090(a)(2). ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR # 6185 =(302/MJM)
